tracks.rawText: 3:37Ritual of the Deep Pulsev5.5Psytrance ritual tribal at 145–150 BPM with a relentless four-on-the-floor kick, rubbery offbeat bass, hand drums, shakers, frame drum pulses, and shamanic vocal chants chopped through delay, Hypnotic arpeggiated synths, resonant filter sweeps, layered percussion, and dark atmospheric drones create a dense, trance-inducing groove1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 1:54Neon Rootsv5.5Future Egyptian with maqam-inspired synth leads, microtonal ney samples, and distorted darbuka over a trap grid, 808 sub-bass, razor-sharp hi-hats, metallic percussion, and sepulchral chants, Analog drones, gritty sidechained pads, and desert-scale FX create a tense blend of ancient motifs and brutal futuristic club energyPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:15Neon Rootsv5.5Psychedelic rock with metal edge: fuzz-drenched drop-tuned guitars, wah-wah leads, and phasered arpeggios over a crushing double-kick groove, Nasal, speech-like vocal delivery rides the riff with tight rhythmic phrasing, tape echo throws, thick analog bass, and swirling organ layers for a heavy, trippy texture3PublishRemix
